title: A Strange Facility Beneath the Giant Tree
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Gunko, Unknown person #9, Robin, Giants as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If the culprits are human- sized...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...we'd be better suited to dealing with this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right, the giants can take care of the big things!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We should focus on the intruders!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Agreed, but Elbaf is too big for us to search on foot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Heave ho! Heave ho!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hea...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh? You wanna come with me? I thought you were gonna tell me to stop!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Alright then! But I get to be the captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's so cute...:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Let's go, colon pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Set sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey, you're big enough to row!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Onwards!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All Warriors in the Sun Realm, please be advised...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: BA-DUM

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was a confirmed sighting of humans other than the straw hats earlier at Quest Castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Consider them hostile and dangerous!!!

dialogue.speaker: Gunko
dialogue.text: Giha Ha, it's gunko's post-meal ritual!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's not a ritual.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I just like it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a TD, right? We should have a singing contest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's nice having a hobby...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're out if you mess up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's your favorite song?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 'New World.'

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Giha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! You got a problem with the current one?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You shouldn't mock the interests of others, summers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ah, my bad... anyway, lookie over there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That grown-up is going all out to try and save the kids!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now there ain't no way they can stab me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They ain't goin' nowhere!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: You've got this, Saul!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The kids are just followin' this cloth, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But it's headin' straight for the flames!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They'll die if I don't stop 'em!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: All right, they're stop--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: AGGHHH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: FRICK!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: AAAH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the--?!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
